best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-dashboardactivity-001 title: navigating from dashboardactivity to mainactivity module: dashboardactivity source pages: 1 preconditions: user is logged into the application. test data: test steps: 1. open dashboardactivity. 2. tap on the navigation icon to open mainactivity. expected result: mainactivity should be displayed with appropriate ui elements.

test case id: tc-mainactivity-002 title: navigating from mainactivity to userlistactivity module: mainactivity source pages: 1 preconditions: user is logged into the application. test data: test steps: 1. open mainactivity. 2. tap on the "user list" button. expected result: userlistactivity should be displayed with appropriate ui elements.

test case id: tc-signupactivity-001 title: successful sign-up process module: signupactivity source pages: 1 preconditions: user is not logged into the application. test data: valid email and password. test steps: 1. open signupactivity. 2. enter a valid email and password. 3. tap on the "sign up" button. expected result: user should be successfully signed up and redirected to mainactivity.
